attributes.description: This dashboard provides insights into the credits and billing data for ESS.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

embeddableConfig.description: Run rate (ECUs per day) computed as average of the last 7 days of the filtered time period

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

params.markdown:
# 🪙 Credits dashboard

Displaying this dashboard correctly requires an existing active commercial commitment with Elastic.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

attributes.title: [Metrics ESS Billing] Credits dashboard
